urdu transliteration text:
Asghar ko leke godh may kehti hai karbalaThe Land of Karbala took Asghar in its embrace…   English Transliteration
@HujjatELC

Asghar ko leke godh may kehti hai karbalaYe wo ali hai jisko kabhi ghar nahi mila
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The land of Karbala took Asghar in its embrace and said,
This is the Ali who never had a home

urdu transliteration text:
Cheh maah ke ghareeb musaafir ko saump keKehne lagay hussain ye qabre sagheer seRakhna zara khayaal mere tishnakaam kaYe wo ali hai jisko kabhi ghar nahi mila
Handing over his 6 month old baby to the earth,
Hussain said to the tiny grave,
Please look after my thirsty baby
@HujjatELC
english translation text: This is the Ali who never had a home

His mother kept weeping and would say,
Sughra, from your lap to the grave
This is the Ali who never had a home

urdu transliteration text:
Maa sochti thi dhalta hai din ho rahi hai shaamJhoole may laut aayega shayad wo tishnakaamLekin ghazab hua ke wo jhoola bhi jal gayaYe wo ali hai jisko kabhi ghar nahi mila
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
His mother would think, now the day is coming to an end and the sun is setting
Maybe the thirsty baby will return to his cradle
But the tragedy was that even the cradle got burnt
This is the Ali who never had a home

In the alleys of Kufa and the bazaar of Shaam
Or sometimes in the court of Yazid
This is the Ali who never had a home

Sajjad would keep looking at the baby’s head wistfully,
He would cry tears of blood and say
This is the Ali who never had a home

When the caravan started to leave Karbala
Look after him, oh Land of Karbala
This is the Ali who never had a home
